message:
Merge pull request #233 from naman9271/build

Add gh token

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# GitHub Token for fetching documentation from the repository
+# This is required for the build process to fetch docs from GitHub
+# Create a token at: https://github.com/settings/tokens
+# Required scopes: public_repo (or just read access to public repositories)
+GITHUB_TOKEN=

@@ -31,7 +31,8 @@ yarn-error.log*
 .pnpm-debug.log*
 
 # env files (can opt-in for committing if needed)
-.env*
+.env.local
+.env
 
 # vercel
 .vercel
